result.content:
# ローカル開発用サンプル（Secretsはダミーのみ）
# - 実値は .env に設定してください（.env はコミット禁止）
# - CI/本番は OS環境変数（GitHub Actions Secrets 等）で設定してください

# --- ComfyUI ---
COMFYUI_URL=http://localhost:8188

# --- Ollama（sd-prompt / generate_sd_prompt 用）---
OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434

# --- ManaOS Unified API Server (security) ---
# Safe defaults: localhost bind, debug off
MANAOS_INTEGRATION_HOST=127.0.0.1
MANAOS_INTEGRATION_PORT=9500
MANAOS_DEBUG=false
MANAOS_WAITRESS_THREADS=8
MANAOS_WAITRESS_IDENT=manaos-unified-api

# Auth (recommended)
# - Admin key: full access (read + ops)
# - Ops key: privileged endpoints / write actions
# - Read-only key: non-sensitive GET endpoints
MANAOS_INTEGRATION_API_KEY=change_me_admin_key
MANAOS_INTEGRATION_OPS_API_KEY=change_me_ops_key
MANAOS_INTEGRATION_READONLY_API_KEY=change_me_readonly_key

# If no keys are set, server defaults to localhost-only access.
MANAOS_ALLOW_NOAUTH_LOCAL=true

# Optional IP allow/block lists (comma-separated exact IPs; enable XFF trust only behind a secure proxy)
MANAOS_IP_ALLOWLIST=
MANAOS_IP_BLOCKLIST=
MANAOS_TRUST_X_FORWARDED_FOR=false

# CORS (comma-separated origins)
MANAOS_ENABLE_CORS=true
MANAOS_CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3001,http://127.0.0.1:3001

# Read-only / sensitive path prefixes (comma-separated)
# - Read-only key can access only these GET/HEAD endpoints
# - Sensitive prefixes are treated as ops even for GET
MANAOS_READONLY_PATH_PREFIXES=/health,/ready,/status,/openapi.json,/api/integrations/status
MANAOS_SENSITIVE_PATH_PREFIXES=/emergency,/api/emergency,/api/system/docker

# Admin-only path prefixes (comma-separated)
# These endpoints require `MANAOS_INTEGRATION_API_KEY` even if ops/read keys are set.
MANAOS_ADMIN_ONLY_PATH_PREFIXES=/emergency,/api/emergency,/api/system/docker,/api/llm,/api/memory,/api/google_drive,/api/rows,/api/n8n,/api/civitai,/api/voice,/api/slack

# Audit log (secret-safe)
MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG=true
MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG_FORMAT=json
# If empty, defaults to: <repo>/logs/audit/manaos_audit_{date}.jsonl
# You can override by setting an absolute path.
MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG_FILE=
MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG_MAX_BYTES=5242880
MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG_BACKUPS=5

# Add minimal security headers to all responses
MANAOS_SECURITY_HEADERS=true
MANAOS_DEBUG_ERRORS=false

# Rate limiting / concurrency (best-effort, in-process)
MANAOS_RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=true
MANAOS_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS=60
MANAOS_RATE_LIMIT_RPM=60
# Prefix rules: "/api/llm=20,/api/system/docker=10"
MANAOS_RATE_LIMIT_RULES=
MANAOS_CONCURRENCY_ENABLED=true
# Prefix limits: "/api/llm=2,/api/system/docker=1"
MANAOS_CONCURRENCY_LIMITS=

# Second-factor confirmation token (optional but recommended for emergency/system operations)
# If set, requests to `MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_PATH_PREFIXES` must include `X-Confirm-Token: <token>`.
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN=
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_PATH_PREFIXES=/api/emergency,/api/system/docker

# Safer mode: time-based HMAC confirm token (recommended)
# If `MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_SECRET` is set, time-based mode is used (preferred over static token).
# Client computes:
#   X-Confirm-Token = HMAC_SHA256_HEX(secret, floor(unix_time / period_seconds))
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_SECRET=
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_PERIOD_SECONDS=30
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_ACCEPT_PREVIOUS=true

# Optional: bind time-HMAC token to protected path prefix (more secure; requires client change)
MANAOS_CONFIRM_TOKEN_BIND_PATH=false

# Optional: token substitution in MANAOS_AUDIT_LOG_FILE
# Example: C:\logs\manaos_audit_{date}.jsonl  (date => YYYYMMDD)

# OpenAPI exposure
MANAOS_EXPOSE_OPENAPI=true

# MCP: enable dangerous VS Code tools only when needed
MANAOS_ENABLE_VSCODE_TOOLS=false

# --- Moltbot Gateway（まなOS → このは 1本ゲート）---
# runner が最後まで通るには URL と SECRET を揃える（このは側 gateway_app と同じ値）
MOLTBOT_GATEWAY_URL=http://<このはのIP or ドメイン>:8088
MOLTBOT_GATEWAY_SECRET=your_shared_secret_here

# --- n8n ---
N8N_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5679
N8N_API_KEY=your_n8n_api_key_here

# --- CivitAI ---
CIVITAI_API_KEY=your_civitai_api_key_here

# --- Slack ---
SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/<YOUR>/<WEBHOOK>/<URL>
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-<your-bot-token>

# --- ask_orchestrator 本格運用（Slack 通知＋集計）---
# Portal 経由でオーケストレータを叩く場合、メトリクス＋抑制付きアラートが有効。
# オーケストレータアラート用チャンネル（空なら slack_integration のデフォルト）。Slack は slack_integration（SLACK_BOT_TOKEN）を優先、なければ SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
ORCHESTRATOR_ALERT_CHANNEL=
# 同一 error_code で通知を抑止する分数（デフォルト: 30）
ORCHESTRATOR_ALERT_SUPPRESSION_MINUTES=30
# Portal → 5106 のタイムアウト（秒）。外部クライアント用は短め推奨（8〜15）
PORTAL_ORCHESTRATOR_TIMEOUT=12

# --- System 3 / Phase 2 アラート ---
# ヘルスチェック失敗・Phase2 STOP 時に Webhook へ POST（未設定なら何もしない）
SYSTEM3_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL=
PHASE2_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL=
# 連続失敗がこの回数以上で通知（デフォルト: 2、1 にすると毎回通知）
SYSTEM3_ALERT_CONSECUTIVE_THRESHOLD=2

# System 3 HTTP リトライのデフォルトタイムアウト（秒）
SYSTEM3_HTTP_TIMEOUT=10

# Obsidian Vault パス（System 3 / Playbook / 日次ログ等で使用）
OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH=

# --- Rows ---
ROWS_API_KEY=your_rows_api_key_here

# --- Google Drive（必要に応じて）---
GOOGLE_DRIVE_CREDENTIALS=path/to/credentials.json
GOOGLE_DRIVE_TOKEN=path/to/token.json
